facebook.caption:
POV: you grab a bánh mì on the way to the beach and it becomes the highlight of your day.

Bánh Mì & You in Cửa Lấp is sitting at 4.8 stars across 685 reviews. That's not luck. The bread is crisp, the fillings are loaded, and it costs almost nothing.

Easy to drive past. Don't.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
